overview: Dr. Vigor provides advanced medical services to enhance fertility, vitality, and wellbeing, specializing in testosterone therapy, erectile dysfunction treatments, and sexual performance enhancement. The clinic offers additional services including fertility support, hair restoration, weight loss programs, and aesthetic treatments.
highlights: Calibrated TRT (plant-derived) with proactive bloodwork and symptom-based adjustments
Vigor VIP membership offering concierge clinical oversight and 40% pricing discount
